title: v14 Stage Kernel Refactor
goal: Upgrade Symphony from prompt/workflow/run-driven orchestration into a Stage-aware wrapper kernel.
goals: 把 Symphony 从 prompt / workflow / run 驱动，升级成 Stage 驱动的项目推进内核。
Make existing do/review/verify/adopt/diagnose/console flows Stage-aware without replacing the kernel.
nonGoals: Do not change v12 verified adoption apply safety semantics.
Do not add browser write controls.
Do not migrate Workbench to React or Vite in v14.
Do not implement full Autopilot or Agent Capability Registry.

boundaries.title: Wrapper-first Stage kernel
boundaries.rule: Stage behavior wraps existing scan/do/review/verify/adopt flows instead of replacing the kernel.

boundaries.title: Preserve v12 adoption safety
boundaries.rule: Adoption keeps isolated workspace, frozen plan, verifier gate, frozen patch, fingerprint checks, git apply --check, and confirmation journal behavior.

boundaries.title: Workbench remains read-only
boundaries.rule: Workbench may display and copy commands, but must not add write, retry, adopt, delete, rollback, or browser-execute controls.

tasks.title: Add Stage Charter JSON and generated HTML support
Persist active Stage runtime state under .symphony/stages
Add Stage CLI commands and advisory next command
Bind do/review/verify runs to active Stage
Block writes/executions/adoption confirm when the Stage Charter is inconsistent
Show current Stage overview in Workbench without write controls
Add tests and v14 release evidence

risks.title: v12 adoption safety regression
risks.mitigation: Keep adoption apply logic intact and add only wrapper summary/gate checks before confirmation.

risks.title: Stage JSON and HTML drift
risks.mitigation: Treat JSON as source of truth and gate write/execution actions on deterministic HTML consistency.

risks.title: Workbench accidentally grows write controls
risks.mitigation: Expose Stage details through GET APIs and copy-only commands only.
